## Summary

<!-- 3-6 bullets. Focus on what changed for reviewers and why it matters. -->

> PR title format: `feat(scope): summary`, `fix(scope): summary`, `doc(scope): summary`, etc.
>
> Preferred branch format: `feat/short-slug`, `fix/short-slug`, `doc/short-slug`, etc.
>
> See `.github/NAMING_CONVENTIONS.md` for the canonical naming rules.

## Problem

<!-- What issue, risk, or opportunity does this PR address? -->

## Solution

<!-- How does this change solve the problem? Note tradeoffs when relevant. -->

## Validation

> Replace non-applicable items with `N/A: <reason>`. Do not delete checklist items.
>
> Suggested local check: `bash scripts/repo_check.sh`

- [ ] Relevant local checks ran
- [ ] New or changed behavior was tested
- [ ] Risk / rollback impact was reviewed
- [ ] Follow-up work is documented, or N/A with reason

## Risks

<!-- User impact, operational risk, migration risk, compatibility risk, or `N/A: none`. -->

## Related

<!--
Use issue references when available.
Examples:
- Closes #123
- Related: #456
- Follow-up: #789
-->
